data.title: Skillsoft Corp Reports Strong Fiscal 2025 Results
data.description:
Skillsoft Corp ( (SKIL) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Skillsoft Corp presented to its investors.

Skillsoft Corp, a leading provider of digital learning and talent management solutions, is renowned for its AI-powered platform that helps organizations and learners enhance their skills and bridge talent gaps across various industries. The company serves a global community of over 95 million learners, including 60% of the Fortune 1000.

Skillsoft Corp reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025, showcasing a strong performance in adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow, despite a slight decline in total revenue compared to the previous year. The company also provided a positive financial outlook for fiscal 2026, emphasizing its strategic transformation initiatives.

In fiscal 2025, Skillsoft achieved a total revenue of $531 million, with its Talent Development Solutions segment seeing a slight increase in revenue to $406 million. The company reported a significant reduction in its GAAP net loss to $122 million, down from $349 million in the prior year, and maintained a stable adjusted net income of $35 million. Notably, Skillsoft’s adjusted EBITDA reached $109 million, reflecting a margin expansion to 21% of revenue.

The company’s strategic initiatives, including AI capabilities and ecosystem integrations, have shown promising early interest, with nearly 1 million launches of its AI simulator, Skillsoft CAISY™. Skillsoft’s management remains optimistic about fiscal 2026, aiming for continued margin expansion, positive free cash flow, and a return to top-line growth, despite potential macroeconomic challenges.

Looking ahead, Skillsoft is poised to capitalize on its strategic transformation and AI advancements, with a financial outlook projecting GAAP revenue between $530 million and $545 million and adjusted EBITDA ranging from $112 million to $118 million for fiscal 2026.

data.title: Vista Group International Announces Quotation of New Securities
data.description:
Vista Group International Ltd ( (AU:VGL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Vista Group International Ltd has announced the quotation of 1,158,179 ordinary fully paid foreign exempt securities on the NZX, effective April 15, 2025. This move is part of the company’s strategy to optimize its capital structure and enhance its market presence, potentially impacting its operational capabilities and offering new opportunities for stakeholders.

More about Vista Group International Ltd

Vista Group International Ltd operates within the technology sector, focusing on providing software solutions for the film industry. The company offers a range of products and services designed to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of cinema operations and film distribution.

data.title: Commonwealth Bank Redeems PERLS X Capital Notes
data.description:
Commonwealth Bank of Australia ( (AU:CBA) ) just unveiled an update.

Commonwealth Bank of Australia announced the redemption of all outstanding CommBank PERLS X Capital Notes at their face value of A$100 each, with a final distribution of A$0.4467 per note paid on April 15, 2025. This move reflects the bank’s ongoing management of its capital structure and may impact its financial strategies and stakeholder interests.

More about Commonwealth Bank of Australia

Commonwealth Bank of Australia (CBA) is a major financial institution in Australia, providing a wide range of banking and financial services including retail, business, and institutional banking. The bank is focused on maintaining a strong presence in the Australian market, offering products such as loans, credit cards, and investment services.

data.title: Zoom2u Technologies to Release Q3 FY25 Report and Host Investor Webinar
data.description:
Zoom2u Technologies Ltd. ( (AU:Z2U) ) has issued an update.

Zoom2u Technologies Ltd. announced the upcoming release of its Q3 FY25 Quarterly Activities Report and an investor webinar scheduled for April 30, 2025. The webinar will feature presentations by the company’s CEO and CFO, providing a business update and allowing investors to engage through a Q&A session. This initiative reflects Zoom2u’s commitment to transparency and stakeholder engagement, potentially impacting its market positioning by keeping investors informed and involved.

More about Zoom2u Technologies Ltd.

Zoom2u Technologies Ltd. operates in the logistics and delivery industry, leveraging AI, cloud infrastructure, and SaaS technology to enhance last-mile delivery and logistics operations. The company offers platforms such as Locate2u, Zoom2u, and Shred2u, which provide scalable solutions for delivery management, route optimization, and real-time visibility for businesses of all sizes.

data.title: Caprice Resources Director Increases Shareholding
data.description:
Caprice Resources Ltd. ( (AU:CRS) ) has shared an announcement.

Caprice Resources Ltd has announced a change in the indirect interest of its director, Scott Deakin. The change involves the acquisition of 600,000 ordinary shares by Leeuwin Equity Pty Ltd, acting as trustee for the Deakin Family Trust, bringing the total to 15,792,219 shares. This transaction, valued at $33,000, was an on-market purchase, indicating a potential vote of confidence in the company’s future prospects by its leadership.

data.title: Kyokuto Securities Reports Preliminary Fiscal Year 2025 Results
data.description:
Kyokuto Securities Co ( (JP:8706) ) has provided an update.

Kyokuto Securities Co., Ltd announced its preliminary financial results for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2025, showing a 3.3% increase in operating revenue and a 2.4% rise in profit attributable to owners of the parent. The increase in profit is attributed to higher commissions received and extraordinary income from the sale of investment securities, despite a decline in operating and ordinary profit compared to the previous year.

More about Kyokuto Securities Co

Kyokuto Securities Co., Ltd is a company operating in the financial services industry, primarily focusing on securities trading and investment services. It is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under the stock code 8706.

data.title: Poonawalla Fincorp Expands with New Gold Loan Business
data.description:
Poonawalla Fincorp Limited ( (IN:POONAWALLA) ) has shared an update.

Poonawalla Fincorp Limited has launched a Gold Loan Business, expanding its secured lending portfolio. This initiative aims to provide fast, secure, and transparent financing solutions for various financial needs, with quick approvals and flexible repayment options. The company plans to open 400 new branches in Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities over the next year to strengthen its market presence. The gold loan market in India is poised for significant growth, and Poonawalla Fincorp is strategically positioned to capture this opportunity by focusing on customer-centric services and premium offerings.

More about Poonawalla Fincorp Limited

Poonawalla Fincorp Limited, part of the Cyrus Poonawalla Group, is a non-banking financial company (NBFC) focused on consumer and MSME lending. The company offers a range of secured lending products and aims to expand its presence in Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities.

YTD Price Performance: 16.64%

Average Trading Volume: 113,905

Current Market Cap: 285B INR
